product_overview: A mobile-first single-page application that guides Eltex customers through uploading property documents, selecting their province, signing required legal authorizations, optionally completing an energy-certificate survey, and submitting a final checklist. Assessors use a password-protected dashboard to review projects and download submitted assets.
core_goals: Allow customers to upload required property documents (DNI/NIE, IBI, electricity bill) and confirm extracted data
Let customers select their province so the app determines which legal documents must be signed
Enable customers to apply required legal signatures for their province and defer signing if needed
Collect optional energy-certificate technical data via a 4-step survey or allow the customer to skip it
Present a review checklist and let customers submit the completed project to Eltex
Provide an assessor dashboard to view submitted projects and download project archives

features.name: Phone Number Entry
features.description: Customer provides their Spanish mobile number to locate their project and be routed to the correct project URL.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type Spanish mobile phone number -> Submit phone number -> Be redirected to /?code=ELT20250001 (project found)
Navigate to / -> Type a phone number not associated with a project -> Submit phone number -> See an error message indicating number not found

features.name: Property Document Upload
features.description: Customer uploads identity (DNI/NIE), IBI certificate, and electricity bill. AI extracts data from each upload and shows extracted fields for review.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003 -> Tap camera icon to upload DNI/NIE front photo -> Review AI-extracted name, DNI number and expiry date -> Upload IBI certificate photo or PDF -> Upload electricity bill pages -> Submit property documents and continue to province selection

Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003 -> Upload DNI card front only (front image detected as card-front-only) -> Attempt to continue -> See validation message requiring DNI back upload -> Upload DNI back photo -> Continue to province selection

features.name: Province Selection
features.description: Customer confirms or selects their province/region; the chosen province controls which legal documents need signing.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002 -> If province not auto-detected, open province selection list -> Select Cataluña -> Confirm province and continue to representation
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002 -> Select Madrid -> Confirm province and continue to representation -> If needed, use back action to return to property documents at /?code=ELT20250003

features.name: Legal Document Signing (Representation)
features.description: Customer applies required signatures to region-specific legal PDFs using the signature pad, or defers signing for later.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Draw a signature on the signature canvas (in dev tests call window.__eltexFillTestSignature() to programmatically draw) -> Apply signature and continue to the next step (energy-certificate or review)
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Choose to defer signing for now -> Continue to the next step without signatures

features.name: Energy Certificate Survey
features.description: Customer completes a 4-step technical survey to generate the energy certificate, or opts to skip the entire survey.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004 -> Fill housing data fields (cadastral reference, area, floors, ceiling height, bedrooms) -> Advance to openings step -> Fill openings data (orientation counts, frame and glass types, shutters) -> Advance to thermal systems step -> Fill thermal systems info (water heater, boiler, A/C, heating emitters) -> Advance to additional info step -> Select product sold and existing-customer status -> Confirm final step to complete the survey and proceed to review
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004 -> Click to skip the energy certificate survey -> Be marked as skipped and continue to the review step

features.name: Review and Submit
features.description: Customer reviews a checklist of all required items, navigates back to fix incomplete items, and submits the completed project to Eltex.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250005 -> View checklist showing completion status of all required items -> Click an incomplete item to go back and fix it (for example go to /?code=ELT20250003 to upload missing documents) -> Return to review -> Submit the project -> See the success confirmation screen
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250005 -> Ensure checklist is complete -> Submit the project -> See success confirmation

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Password-protected dashboard for assessors to view submitted projects, inspect uploaded documents and extracted data, and download project ZIP or CSV exports.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Enter password "eltex2025" -> View list of submitted projects -> Open a project detail modal -> View uploaded documents and extracted data -> Download project ZIP or individual assets -> Log out to return to the login screen
Navigate to /dashboard -> Enter password incorrectly -> See authentication error and remain on the login screen

code_summary.routing_notes: IMPORTANT: This is a pure SPA. ALL customer routes are accessed via the root path with a query param: /?code=ELTXXXXXX (e.g. /?code=ELT20250001). Section paths like /property-docs, /province-selection, /representation, /energy-certificate, /review now redirect back to /?code=... automatically. So these paths ARE safe to navigate to — they will redirect correctly. The app uses internal React state (currentSection) to switch between sections. To test a specific section, navigate to /?code=ELTXXXXXX and the app routes automatically to the correct step based on form completion state. Test project ELT20250004 and ELT20250005 are pre-seeded for energy-certificate flow. Test project ELT20250001 is a standard Solar project — Cataluña region.

test_helpers.name: window.__eltexFillTestSignature
test_helpers.description: Call this JS function in the browser to programmatically draw a valid signature on the signature canvas without needing canvas mouse events. Available only in non-production (dev) builds. Usage in Playwright: await page.evaluate('window.__eltexFillTestSignature && window.__eltexFillTestSignature()')

test_project_states.use_for: Representation signing tests (TC003, TC009, TC010, TC012, TC014). App lands directly on the representation step. Back button goes to province-selection.
Province selection tests (TC008, TC013). App lands on the province selection step. Selecting Cataluña then continues to representation.
Property document upload tests (TC004, TC007). App lands on property-docs step. IMPORTANT: Use ELT20250003 for any test that needs to upload documents from scratch.
Energy certificate flow tests (TC017, TC018, TC019, TC021).

Review and submit tests (TC001, TC006) when all items are done. WARNING: Energy cert is ALREADY skipped. The skip button is NOT shown at review. For "skip energy certificate" tests use ELT20250004 instead (starts at energy-certificate step). For TC019 (skip energy cert survey), use ELT20250004, NOT ELT20250005.

routes.description: Phone entry (no code). Navigate here and enter phone to find project.
Solar/Cataluña project. CURRENTLY STARTS AT: representation step (has docs + location but no signatures). Use for representation tests.
Aerothermal project. CURRENTLY STARTS AT: province-selection step (has docs but no location). Use for province selection tests.
Solar project. CURRENTLY STARTS AT: property-docs step (no docs, no location). Use for document upload tests.
Solar project. CURRENTLY STARTS AT: energy-certificate step (location=other, has docs, no energy cert). Use for energy cert tests.
EC-flow project. CURRENTLY STARTS AT: review step (location=other, has docs, energy=skipped). Use for review/submit tests.
Admin dashboard. Password = eltex2025. Enter at /dashboard login page.

property_docs_section.description: Continue button on property documents upload step
Checkmark shown when Eltex contract is accepted

province_selection_section.description: Continue button on province selection step
Back button on province selection step

representation_section.description: Signature pad canvas. Use window.__eltexFillTestSignature() to inject a valid test signature programmatically. data-has-signature=true/false.
Apply signature + continue button. Disabled until signature drawn. data-signed=true/false. Use window.__eltexFillTestSignature() first.
Firmar-mas-tarde button. Defers signing and continues to next step without signature.
Back button on representation signing step

energy_certificate_section.description: Skip the entire energy certificate survey (marks as skipped)
Next step button in the energy certificate survey
Previous step button in the energy certificate survey
Final confirm/complete button on the last survey step

review_section.description: Submit documentation button (green). Only visible when all items in checklist are complete. Clicking submits the form.
Success screen shown after successful form submission. Look for data-testid='success-section' to verify submission completed.

dashboard.description: Open project detail modal for a project in the dashboard list
Container for view/download buttons per file
Eye icon — opens asset file in new browser tab
Download icon — downloads the asset file
Descargar ZIP button — downloads full project ZIP archive. Located in the project-detail-modal header. Open modal with ver-expediente-btn first.
Exportar CSV button — downloads all project data as CSV. Located in the dashboard toolbar.
Cerrar sesión (logout) button — logs out the assessor and returns to the login screen.

features.name: Phone Number Entry
features.description: Customer enters their Spanish mobile number. System looks up their project and redirects to the form with ?code=ELTXXXXXX.
user_interactions: Type phone number into input field
Click "Continuar" button to submit
See error message if number not found
Get redirected to /?code=ELTXXXXXX on success

features.name: Property Document Upload
features.description: Customer uploads identity document (DNI/NIE), IBI certificate, and electricity bill. AI extracts data from each document automatically.
features.note: IMPORTANT: Use ELT20250003 for property docs tests. ELT20250001 ALREADY has docs uploaded and starts at representation, NOT property-docs.
user_interactions: Tap camera icon to upload DNI/NIE front photo
Review AI-extracted name, DNI number, expiry date
Tap to upload DNI back photo (required for card-front-only uploads)
Tap to upload IBI certificate photo or PDF
Tap to upload electricity bill (one or more pages)
Click property-docs-continue-btn to proceed to province selection

features.name: Province Selection
features.description: Customer selects their province/region. This determines which legal signing documents are required.
features.note: IMPORTANT: Use ELT20250002 for province selection tests. ELT20250001 has location=cataluna already set and SKIPS province-selection (starts at representation).
user_interactions: If province not auto-detected click select-province-btn to open list
Click province-btn-cataluna or province-btn-madrid or province-btn-valencia
Click province-continue-btn to proceed

features.name: Legal Document Signing (Representation)
features.description: Customer signs region-specific legal PDFs using a canvas-based signature pad. Cataluña requires 3 signatures, Madrid/Valencia require 2, other provinces skip. IMPORTANT: Use window.__eltexFillTestSignature() to inject a test signature on the signature-canvas element. Then click representation-continue-btn to apply.
user_interactions: Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature() to draw test signature on canvas
Click representation-continue-btn to apply signatures to all documents
Or click representation-defer-btn to skip signing for now

features.name: Energy Certificate Survey
features.description: 4-step survey capturing technical housing data for the energy certificate. Customer signs the completed certificate or skips the whole survey.
features.note: IMPORTANT: Use ELT20250004 for energy cert tests (starts at energy-certificate step). ELT20250001 does NOT go to energy-certificate — it starts at representation. There is NO signature canvas in the energy cert section; window.__eltexFillTestSignature() is NOT needed here. The skip button (skip-energy-certificate-btn) is only shown on the energy-certificate section, NOT on the review section.
user_interactions: Click skip-energy-certificate-btn to skip the entire survey
Or fill in fields and use energy-cert-next-btn to advance steps
On the final step 4, click energy-cert-confirm-btn to complete (no signature needed)

features.name: Review and Submit
features.description: Shows a checklist of all required items with completion status. Customer reviews all items and submits to Eltex.
user_interactions: View checklist of all submitted items
Click incomplete items to go back and fix them
Click review-submit-btn to submit (only visible when all docs complete)
See success screen after submission

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Password-protected dashboard for Eltex assessors to view submitted projects, review documents, and download ZIPs.
user_interactions: Enter password "eltex2025" to log in
View list of all submitted projects
Click ver-expediente-btn to open project-detail-modal for a project
Inside modal view uploaded document images and extracted data
Click view-asset-btn (eye) to open individual file in new tab
Click download-asset-btn to download individual file
Click "Descargar ZIP" to download all project files as ZIP
Click "Exportar CSV" to export project list
Click "Cerrar sesión" to log out

known_limitations.issue: File inputs cannot be pre-populated — browser security prevents this. After restoring form state, check for visible thumbnail previews not input.files values.
known_limitations.impact: Tests checking input.files will show null even when file is restored from localStorage backup

known_limitations.issue: Province auto-detection reads from IBI/electricity bill extraction. ELT20250001 may auto-detect Cataluña from stored extraction data.
known_limitations.impact: If province is already detected, the select-province-btn won't appear — the confirmed province chip will show instead

known_limitations.issue: Signature canvas requires mouse events to draw. Use window.__eltexFillTestSignature() instead.
known_limitations.impact: Canvas mouse-draw events in headless browsers do not trigger signature detection

known_limitations.issue: Province "other" is no longer a user-selectable option but exists in legacy data
known_limitations.impact: Old projects with location="other" will skip signing section correctly
